productName: Const HRG CBN 1:1:1 Berry Blast 10 Pack 300mg
description: An artisan sweet, ripe berry edible made to feel special — rich flavor, soft sweetness, and a cannabis finish that stays smooth and approachable. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 1:1:1 ratio. A craveable infused treat that feels right at home next to the best sweets on the shelf.
